content.text:
<user_query>
Explore repository for identity enrichment, ABN GUD usage, Perplexity outputs, HTML extraction, and report generation/persistence logic. Return: (1) exact file paths, (2) existing data structures for identitySignals/wowSummary._full, (3) ABN-related calls and social extraction logic if present, (4) report table/PDF/quota code locations, (5) test files covering these paths.
</user_query>
Searching the repository for identity enrichment, ABN/GUD, Perplexity, HTML extraction, and report logic.

Here is a concise map of the repo (workspace: `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\hoq`).

---

## 1) Exact file paths (by theme)

**Identity enrichment (calibration flow)**  
- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\hoq\supabase\functions\calibration-business-dna\index.ts` — Perplexity + scrape/HTML + `extractIdentitySignals`, GPT extraction, merge into `extracted_data`, optional `business_profiles` update  
- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\hoq\frontend\src\hooks\useCalibrationState.js` — orchestrates scrape → edge scan → backend enrichment merge → `wowSummary` / `identitySignals` → profile save  
- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\hoq\frontend\src\components\calibration\ForensicIdentityCard.js` — `parseIdentitySignals`, UI, ABN lookup button  
- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\hoq\backend\routes\calibration.py` — `POST /enrichment/website` (mounted as `/api/enrichment/website`), HTML helpers including `_extract_social_handles_from_html`  
- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\hoq\supabase\functions\scrape-business-profile\index.ts` — deterministic HTML → `StructuredMetadata`  

**ABN + ABR “GUD”**  
- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\hoq\supabase\functions\business-identity-lookup\index.ts` — ABR JSONP (`AbnDetails.aspx`, `MatchingNames.aspx`); env: `ABR_GUID` **or** `ABR_GUD` **or** `ABR_API_GUID`  

**Perplexity**  
- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\hoq\supabase\functions\calibration-business-dna\index.ts`  
- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\hoq\supabase\functions\biqc-insights-cognitive\index.ts`  
- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\hoq\supabase\functions\market-analysis-ai\index.ts`  
- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\hoq\supabase\functions\strategic-console-ai\index.ts`  
- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\hoq\supabase\functions\competitor-monitor\index.ts`  

**HTML extraction (non-exhaustive)**  
- Edge: `calibration-business-dna` — `fetchWebsiteHtml`, `stripHtmlTags`, regex meta/title/body  
- Edge: `scrape-business-profile` — `extractMetadata(html, url)`  
- Backend: `calibration.py` — `_extract_meta_content`, `_extract_title`, `_extract_social_handles_from_html`  
- Also: `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\hoq\backend\routes\sdd.py`, `ingestion_engine.py`, `hybrid_ingestion.py`, `engagement_engine.py`, `forensic_audit.py`, `core\helpers.py`  

**Reports / PDF / DB persistence / quota**  
- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\hoq\backend\routes\reports.py` — `POST /reports/generate-pdf`, `GET /reports/download/{filename}`, inserts `report_exports`  
- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\hoq\supabase\migrations\021_trust_reconstruction.sql` — `report_exports` table definition  
- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\hoq\supabase\migrations\065_rls_tenant_lockdown.sql` — RLS on `report_exports`  
- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\hoq\frontend\src\pages\ReportsPage.js` — UI, `localStorage` 30-day keys, `POST /reports/generate-pdf`  
- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\hoq\backend\routes\deps.py` — `check_rate_limit` (monthly quota + burst, `ai_usage_log`)  
- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\hoq\supabase\migrations\036_risk_calibration_analytics.sql` — `ic_risk_calibration_report()` (SQL function name; different from PDF reports)  
- `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\hoq\backend\routes\spine_api.py` — RPC `ic_risk_calibration_report`  

---

## 2) Data structures: `identitySignals` vs `wowSummary._full`

**Edge `identity_signals` / `extractIdentitySignals` (Deno)** — `Record<string, any>` with fields such as:  
`business_name_candidates`, `abn_candidates`, `acn_candidates`, `phone_numbers`, `email_addresses`, `social_media_links` (platform → URL), `address_candidates`, `geographic_mentions`, `state_abbreviations`, `page_signals` (booleans), `domain`, `email_matches_domain`, plus optional hints: `abn_hint`, `business_name_hint`, `location_hint` (see `calibration-business-dna\index.ts` ~172–248, 471–474).

**Frontend `identitySignals` (after merge in `useCalibrationState`)** — built from `parseIdentitySignals(ex, url)` then overlaid with edge/deep data and ABN lookup:  
`domain`, `businessName`, `tradingName`, `address`, `city`, `state`, `country`, `geo`, `abn`, `emails`, `phones`, `socials` (`{ platform, url }[]`), `whatYouDo`, `whoYouServe`, flags like `aboutPageExists`, `contactPageExists`, `caseStudiesDetected`, and optionally `_abnLookupResult` (`ForensicIdentityCard.js` `parseIdentitySignals` + `useCalibrationState.js` ~439–488, 816–831).

**`wowSummary._full` (`fullExtraction`)** — spread of merged `extracted_data` (`ex`) plus:  
`_sources`, `_deep_sources` (initial scan), `_website`, `_generated_at`; regenerate path omits `_deep_sources` in one branch (`useCalibrationState.js` ~413–419, 587–596).  
**`wowSummary` (display keys)** — `business_name`, `what_you_do`, `who_you_serve`, `what_sets_you_apart`, `biggest_challenges`, `growth_opportunity`, `competitors`, `abn`, `_full` (`useCalibrationState.js` ~421–431).  
**Consumers** — `ChiefMarketingSummary.js` reads `wowSummary._full` for `business_name`, `main_products_services`, `target_market`, `ideal_customer_profile`, `unique_value_proposition`, `main_challenges`, `growth_strategy`, etc.

**Important:** Backend route for deep enrichment is `@router.post("/enrichment/website")` → **`/api/enrichment/website`**. The hook calls **`apiClient.post('/calibration/enrichment/website', ...)`** → **`/api/calibration/enrichment/website`**, which does not appear on `calibration.py`’s route list—worth validating in runtime (possible dead path or proxy rewrite).

---

## 3) ABN-related calls and social extraction

**ABN regex / candidates** — `calibration-business-dna` `extractIdentitySignals` (`abn_candidates`); merged into GPT `extracted.abn` when missing (`index.ts` ~520–523).  

**ABR API (GUID/GUD)** — `business-identity-lookup\index.ts`: `lookupByAbn`, `searchByName`; `guid=${ABR_GUID}` in URL; `ABR_GUID` from `ABR_GUID` || `ABR_GUD` || `ABR_API_GUID`.  

**Frontend ABN lookup** — `useCalibrationState.js` `handleAbnLookup` → `callEdgeFunction('business-identity-lookup', lookupParams)`.  

**Social extraction** —  
- Edge: regex map `linkedin`, `facebook`, `instagram`, `twitter`/`x`, `youtube` in `extractIdentitySignals` (`calibration-business-dna\index.ts` ~203–218); merged into `extracted.social_media_links` (~536–541).  
- Frontend: `parseIdentitySignals` regexes + `d.social_media_links` (`ForensicIdentityCard.js` ~73–90).  
- Backend enrichment scan: `_extract_social_handles_from_html` (`calibration.py` ~118–133), used in the enrichment path (~952 area per grep).

---

## 4) Perplexity outputs (where they go)

In **`calibration-business-dna`**: five parallel `deepSearch` calls → concatenated `perplexityContent` with section headers; fed into `allContent` for `extractIdentitySignals`, and into `contextBlock` for OpenAI extraction; `data_sources` includes strings like `"Perplexity (identity)"` (`index.ts` ~372–410, 476–478, 590–597).  

Other functions use Perplexity for market/strategic/competitor flows (paths listed in section 1).

---

## 5) Report table / PDF / quota (locations)

| Concern | Location |
|--------|-----------|
| PDF generation | `backend\routes\reports.py` |
| PDF file storage | `/tmp/reports/*.pdf` + download route |
| DB row per export | `report_exports` insert in `reports.py`; schema `021_trust_reconstruction.sql` |
| Frontend PDF trigger | `ReportsPage.js` → `POST /reports/generate-pdf` |
| 30-day “free tier” UI | `ReportsPage.js` `localStorage` keys `biqc_calibration_report_date`, `biqc_scan_report_date` (client-side only) |
| Server-side monthly/burst quota | `backend\routes\deps.py` `check_rate_limit`, `ai_usage_log` |
| Admin copy re quota | `frontend\src\pages\AdminDashboard.js` (rate limit detail text) |

---

## 6) Test files touching these paths

| Area | Tests (under `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\hoq`) |
|------|--------------------------------------------------------|
| Calibration + enrichment endpoint | `backend\tests\test_iteration127_trinity_deep_scan.py`, `test_iteration27_phase2_deconstruction.py`, `test_iteration_130_production.py` (`test_08_calibration_enrichment_deep_scan`), `test_ai_modules_iteration129.py` |
| ABN / identity clear / onboarding fields | `backend\tests\test_iteration95_forensic_corrections.py` |
| PDF reports | `backend\tests\test_iteration79_trust_reconstruction.py` |
| `report_exports` RLS | `backend\tests\test_wave1_hardening_migrations.py` |
| Calibration auth / status (many) | `test_p0_calibration_routes.py`, `test_p0_auth_routing.py`, `test_p0_auth_failopen.py`, `test_iteration34_clean_sweep.py`, `test_iteration35_deployment_readiness.py`, `test_iteration37_auth_e2e.py`, `test_iteration38_titan_glass.py`, `test_iteration39_caching_audit.py`, `test_iteration40_zero_redirect.py`, `test_iteration_104.py`, `test_production_forensic_103.py`, `test_iteration_130_production.py` |
| HTML-not-JSON API | `test_iteration25_html_stability.py`, `test_biqc_iteration24.py`, `test_iteration26_security_p0.py`, `test_iteration27_phase2_deconstruction.py`, `test_iteration28_final_cleanup.py` |

**Note:** There are **no** dedicated unit tests in-repo for the **Supabase Edge** functions (`calibration-business-dna`, `business-identity-lookup`, `scrape-business-profile`); coverage is indirect via backend/frontend tests and manual/playwright artifacts under `test_reports\`.
